title: From Stagflation to Goldilocks, portfolio managers start thinking small
section_path: From Stagflation to Goldilocks, portfolio managers start thinking small
section_path_text: From Stagflation to Goldilocks, portfolio managers start thinking small
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
The three things I would tell my clients this week:
Visibility remains undeniably low. The range of economic scenarios is very wide, and any of them could be realised. The Fed is entering officially a "wait and see mode".
